text: Open Source Intel CBS, citing MarineTraffic: • 6 ships transited the Strait of Hormuz Thursday 2 tankers, 3 cargo ships, 1 bunkering vessel • Wednesday saw 5 ships, all cargo, zero tankers • Tuesday, when the ceasefire was announced, 11 ships crossed, including 9 tankers • Since Feb 28, 212 tankers have passed, about 58% of total traffic Pre war baseline for comparison: ~100–140 vessels per day • Total vessels since Feb 28: ~360–370 • At normal rates, that volume would move in about 3–4 days • Instead, it has taken roughly 40+ days Bottom line: traffic is running at roughly 5–10% of normal levels. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 CBS，援引 MarineTraffic 数据：• 周四有 6 艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡：2 艘油轮，3 艘货船，1 艘加油船 • 周三有 5 艘船只，全部为货船，无油轮 • 周二宣布停火时，有 11 艘船只通过，包括 9 艘油轮 • 自 2 月 28 日以来，共有 212 艘油轮通过，约占总交通量的 58% 战前基准对比：每天约 100–140 艘船只 • 自 2 月 28 日以来的船只总数：约 360–370 艘 • 按正常速度，该运量将在约 3–4 天内完成 • 相反，这花费了大约 40 多天 结论：交通量仅为正常水平的 5–10% 左右。推文

But that is also the beauty of this world: even if you lose it all, you have in reality lost nothing.’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : US Air Force C-17A Globemaster III #AE1173 as RCH667 has completed the 7th medical evacuation from Ramstein AB, Germany to JB Andrews, MD since the launch of Operation EPIC FURY, meeting 1 patient evacuation vehicle (PEV) and 1 medical ambulance bus (MAB) to transport wounded back to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. 1/ Another military medevac flight into Andrews tonight, followed by a Walter Reed patient transport convoy. The Pentagon does not release information as to how many or what type of casualties might be on the flight, but the aircraft made stops in Jordan, Kuwait, and Germany before returning to the USA. - Andrew Leyden tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @TheIntelFrog：美国空军 C-17A 全球霸王 III #AE1173 作为 RCH667，已完成自“史诗愤怒行动”（Operation EPIC FURY）启动以来从德国拉姆施泰因空军基地到马里兰州安德鲁斯联合基地的第 7 次医疗后送，并与 1 辆伤员后送车（PEV）和 1 辆医疗救护巴士（MAB）会合，将伤员送回沃尔特·里德国家军事医疗中心。1/ 今晚又有一次军事医疗后送航班飞抵安德鲁斯，随后是沃尔特·里德伤员运输车队。五角大楼没有公布航班上有多少或什么类型的伤亡人员，但该飞机在返回美国之前曾在约旦、科威特和德国停留。- 安德鲁·莱登 推文

text: Open Source Intel DEAL TO STOP STRIKING IRAN WAS FOR THE HORMUZ TO OPEN. THE HORMUZ IS NOT OPEN, BUT THE US STOPPED ITS STRIKES. For the Trump administration to understand: The Strait of Hormuz is NOT OPEN. The UAE does not and will NEVER accept the Islamic regime in Iran imposing CONDITIONS on access. The UAE is not Britain or the EU. It does not accept any terrorist actor restricting freedom of navigation. As for Pakistan, Turkey, and Saudi Arabia negotiating to keep the regime afloat, understand this: no state has a legitimate right to decide who may pass and under what terms. That is international law, not a bargaining chip. Shame on United Kingdom, NATO, European Union, and anyone who tolerates this regime’s terrorism and piracy. - Amjad Taha أمجد طه tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 停止打击伊朗的协议是为了开放霍尔木兹海峡。霍尔木兹海峡并未开放，但美国停止了打击。特朗普政府需要明白：霍尔木兹海峡没有开放。阿联酋不接受，也永远不会接受伊朗伊斯兰政权对通行施加条件。阿联酋不是英国或欧盟。它不接受任何恐怖主义行为者限制航行自由。至于巴基斯坦、土耳其和沙特阿拉伯为维持该政权而进行的谈判，请明白这一点：没有任何国家有合法权利决定谁可以通过以及在什么条件下通过。这是国际法，而不是讨价还价的筹码。为英国、北约、欧盟以及任何容忍该政权恐怖主义和海盗行为的人感到羞耻。- 阿姆贾德·塔哈（Amjad Taha）推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 The US and Israel have deliberately bombed hundreds of schools, universities, hospitals and civilian sites across Iran in an unprovoked war of aggression. These aren't just war crimes – this is an attack on humanity itself.

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Politico: U.S. President Trump vented to Secretary-General Mark Rutte during their recent meeting, expressing frustration over their lack of support during the war with Iran. Trump signalled he was considering reprisals against allies, while also pushing for concrete steps to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz. However, a White House official downplayed the exchange, stating Trump made no formal demands and has zero expectations from NATO, despite arguing that alliance members benefit heavily from the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Politico：美国总统特朗普在最近与秘书长马克·吕特的会晤中发泄不满，表达了对他们在与伊朗战争期间缺乏支持的沮丧。特朗普暗示他正在考虑对盟友进行报复，同时也推动采取具体措施帮助重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。然而，白宫官员淡化了这次交流，称特朗普没有提出任何正式要求，并且对北约没有任何期望，尽管他认为联盟成员从这条水道中获益匪浅。@wfwitness

text_zh: 🇮🇷 烈士赛义德·阿卜杜勒拉希姆·穆萨维中将的身份牌以及他最后的文字之一：世界是一件坏事，因为即使你赢得了全世界，你也一无所获。但这也是世界好的一面，因为如果你失去了一切，你也就什么都没有失去

text: Open Source Intel For those of you in the U.S. just getting out of holiday, here’s what you missed. Tuesday – Two Week Ceasefire Announced • The U.S. escalated hard inside Iran. Strikes hit Karaj, Arak, and Bushehr. The Pentagon was actively weighing next steps, including deeper strikes on power plants and strategic and nuclear infrastructure. • Iran responded with a major threat. IRGC officials warned they could choke off oil and gas to the West for years. The Strait of Hormuz was effectively restricted, creating immediate pressure on global energy markets. • Pakistan stepped in to mediate. PM Shehbaz Sharif and Army Chief Asim Munir spoke directly with President Trump and JD Vance. • Trump then announced a 2 week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran. The condition was clear: Iran must fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. He described Iran’s 10 point proposal as “workable” and said a deal was close. • Iran’s FM Abbas Araghchi said Iran would guarantee safe passage through the Strait for 2 weeks if attacks on Iran stopped. • Within minutes, missiles were launched toward Israel anyway. Sirens sounded across Tel Aviv and southern Israel. • Core dispute starts here: Iran and Pakistan treated the ceasefire as regional, including Lebanon and Hezbollah. The U.S. and Israel say it only applies to Iran directly. Vance later called this a “misunderstanding.” • Direct U.S. Iran talks were scheduled for Islamabad. Wednesday – ceasefire starts breaking down • The biggest issue: Hormuz never really reopened. Traffic stayed extremely low. Only a handful of vessels moved, mostly not carrying real crude. • The White House said Iran was backing down. Independent shipping data showed the opposite. • U.S. oil executives also got involved directly, pushing back hard against any scenario where Iran controls or taxes shipping through the Strait. • Iran accused the UAE of being involved in strikes on its territory, and Iran hits Saudi energy and gas pipelines and infrastructure. • Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly rejected parts of the ceasefire framework, insisting only Iran’s 10 point plan is acceptable. • Vance clarified the U.S. position: the ceasefire does not apply to Lebanon. He also claimed shipping was improving. Data did not support that. • Israel launches a new surprise attack operation in Lebanon. Under “Operation Eternal Darkness,” around 50 IAF jets struck roughly 100 Hezbollah targets across Beirut, southern Lebanon, and the Bekaa Valley in a concentrated wave. • Lebanese officials reported 300+ killed, 1000+ wounded The IDF said 220 were militants, including many senior commanders. • Lebanon declared April 9 a national day of mourning. • International backlash followed. Kaja Kallas and others called the strikes disproportionate and pushed to include Lebanon in the ceasefire. Thursday – situation escalates further • Saudi Arabia confirmed serious damage from Iranian strikes. About 600,000 barrels per day were knocked offline, with another 700,000 bpd affected via pipeline disruption. • Drone activity increased. Drones reported over Tehran, Tabriz, and Karaj. Iranian air defenses were activated across multiple regions. • Kuwait was struck after drones hit key facilities, including a National Guard site. • Iran hardened its position: no Lebanon ceasefire, no negotiations. Officials called Lebanon inseparable from any deal and warned of consequences. • Benjamin Netanyahu instructed his cabinet to begin preparing talks with Lebanon focused on disarming Hezbollah, while saying military operations will resume with force. • Israel also began preparing for renewed fighting in Gaza after a Hamas deadline expired. • Tensions with Pakistan escalated after its defense minister called for Israel’s destruction. Israel responded sharply. Continued 👇🏻 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 对于那些刚结束假期回到美国的读者，以下是你们错过的内容。周二 – 宣布两周停火 • 美国在伊朗境内大幅升级行动。袭击击中了卡拉杰、阿拉克和布什尔。五角大楼正在积极权衡后续步骤，包括对发电厂以及战略和核基础设施进行更深度的打击。 • 伊朗以重大威胁作为回应。伊斯兰革命卫队官员警告称，他们可能会切断对西方长达数年的石油和天然气供应。霍尔木兹海峡实际上被封锁，对全球能源市场造成了直接压力。 • 巴基斯坦介入调解。总理夏巴兹·谢里夫和陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔直接与特朗普总统和 JD·万斯进行了交谈。 • 特朗普随后宣布美伊之间停火两周。条件很明确：伊朗必须完全重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。他称伊朗的 10 点提议是“可行的”，并表示协议即将达成。 • 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，如果针对伊朗的袭击停止，伊朗将保证霍尔木兹海峡两周的安全通行。 • 几分钟内，导弹还是向以色列发射了。特拉维夫和以色列南部响起了警报。 • 核心争议由此开始：伊朗和巴基斯坦将停火视为区域性的，包括黎巴嫩和真主党。美国和以色列则称其仅直接适用于伊朗。万斯后来称这是一种“误解”。 • 美伊直接会谈定于伊斯兰堡举行。周三 – 停火开始破裂 • 最大的问题：霍尔木兹海峡从未真正重新开放。交通量依然极低。只有少数船只移动，大多没有运载真正的原油。 • 白宫称伊朗正在退缩。独立的航运数据显示恰恰相反。 • 美国石油高管也直接介入，强烈反对任何由伊朗控制或对通过海峡的航运征税的方案。 • 伊朗指责阿联酋参与了对其领土的袭击，伊朗袭击了沙特的能源和天然气管道及基础设施。 • 穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫公开拒绝了停火框架的部分内容，坚持认为只有伊朗的 10 点计划是可以接受的。 • 万斯澄清了美国的立场：停火不适用于黎巴嫩。他还声称航运正在改善。数据并不支持这一点。 • 以色列在黎巴嫩发动了新的突袭行动。在“永恒黑暗行动”下，约 50 架以色列空军喷气式飞机在贝鲁特、黎巴嫩南部和贝卡谷地进行了集中打击，袭击了约 100 个真主党目标。 • 黎巴嫩官员报告称 300 多人死亡，1000 多人受伤。以色列国防军称其中 220 人是武装分子，包括许多高级指挥官。 • 黎巴嫩宣布 4 月 9 日为全国哀悼日。 • 国际社会随之强烈反对。卡娅·卡拉斯等人称袭击不成比例，并推动将黎巴嫩纳入停火范围。周四 – 局势进一步升级 • 沙特阿拉伯证实伊朗的袭击造成了严重破坏。每天约 60 万桶石油产量被切断，另有 70 万桶/日的产量因管道中断受到影响。 • 无人机活动增加。据报道，德黑兰、大不里士和卡拉杰上空出现了无人机。伊朗防空系统在多个地区被激活。 • 科威特在无人机袭击了包括国民警卫队驻地在内的关键设施后遭到打击。 • 伊朗立场强硬：没有黎巴嫩停火，就没有谈判。官员们称黎巴嫩与任何协议都密不可分，并警告了后果。 • 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡指示内阁开始准备与黎巴嫩进行谈判，重点是解除真主党的武装，同时表示军事行动将继续强力进行。 • 以色列还在哈马斯最后期限过后开始为加沙的重新战斗做准备。 • 在巴基斯坦国防部长呼吁摧毁以色列后，与巴基斯坦的紧张局势升级。以色列做出了强烈回应。继续 👇🏻 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House aides received an email last month instructing them not to place bets on prediction markets, CBS News reports, citing sources. “All White House employees are reminded that the misuse of nonpublic information by government employees for financial benefit is a very serious offense and will not be tolerated.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据哥伦比亚广播公司新闻援引消息人士报道，白宫助手上个月收到一封电子邮件，指示他们不要在预测市场上进行投注。“提醒所有白宫员工，政府雇员为经济利益滥用非公开信息是非常严重的违法行为，绝不容忍。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender In another post on his Truth Social app, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has said that Iran’s actions, as it relates to charging fees for transit through the Strait of Hormuz, is “not the agreement we have.” President Trump also called the measure “dishonorable.” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042371445481755082/photo/1 tweet

text: 🇸🇦 700,000 barrels per day cut from Saudi oil production due to US/Israel imposed war on Iran — Saudi Press. The East-West pipeline suffered significant damage from recent attacks. Further conflict is predicted to lead to further reduction of supply and volatility of global oil markets.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 由于美以对伊朗发动的战争，沙特石油产量每天减少 70 万桶 — 沙特新闻社。东西向管道在最近的袭击中遭受了重大破坏。预计进一步的冲突将导致供应进一步减少和全球石油市场的波动。
